calendar.matters:
Mtn For For Relief From Forefeiture
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short
cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch
Lyon, #6840.

Shauna L. Matlin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Brian Tobin.
Witness Brian Tobin sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Kim Shindel, Esq., appearing for Defendant Brian Bageant, not present in court.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit marked for identification and admitted into evidence:
1- 5 pictures from Nov. 11, 2015
2- 10-Day Notice to Cure or Quit (2 pages)
3- Lease dated Mar 4, 1996 (3 pages)
4- 2 pictures from Dec 7, 2015
5- 6 pictures from Dec 2, 2015
6- 22 pictures from Dec 3, 2015

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff
and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 406 Buchanan Street #4, San
Francisco, California 94102.

Damages $3249.24
Holdover damages $2021.60
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $410.00
for a Total Judgment of $5680.84

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Paul Perdue; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Brian Tobin is present.
Attorney Shauna Matlin for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brian Bageant is present.
Attorney Kim Shindel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-25-2016 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
